title: Armageddon
description: An overhaul of Minecraft's way of progressing though the game : bosses, RPG-like, new mechanics, multiplayer compatibility, weapons, ores... !
body:
![Armageddon !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/939bef1551bfc2f8a2cf22d782d4ddbe731458f0_0.webp)

--An overhaul for Minecraft's progression system inspired by Terraria--

"Armageddon is a progression-based boss mod designed to make your Minecraft experience more challenging, immersive, and rewarding. Every ore, every upgrade, every victory must be earned. Forget about rushing through the game — Armageddon makes you fight for it." -Me


 Currently in **V1.5** !

Armageddon Mod is a Forge mod for 1.20.1 (currently). You'll need some dependancy mods to run it perfectly : 
/!\ Geckolib and Curio API and Attribute Fix !!

I also recommend you to install JEI and as the mod is directly compatible with Better Combat you can install it too!



![Armageddon !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52f91b7aa26a1989684c969fa78d072a43f878c3_0.webp)



💥New Mechanics :



Armageddon brings new mechanics to Minecraft :

-The "Blocked Ore" Mechanic : to avoid speedruning the game, you'll now have to beat a Boss before breaking, using, or equipping an armor/a tool. Each boss has his Ore. For example before using the Iron you'll have to defeat the Iron Colossus !



-The "Blocked Nether" Mechanic : before entering the Nether, the player must defeat a boss (Eldorath) who will open the gate to this dimension. Before that if the player try to enter in the Nether he will be sent back to the Overworld in the sky, so be carefull !

-The new Curio "Accesory" Slot : with Armageddon you'll now have 4 new slots called "Accesory" in your Baubles inventory. That slot is used for the new accesories that come with the mod. You can't equip two same accesories in those slots ! ((in theory you can but the effects are not stackeable you'll just lose a slot!)

-The "Bosses Health Multiplayer Scaling" : the mod adds a simple mechanic that works with the 11 additional bosses. When a boss spawns, it will check the number of players around it (up to 6) and increase its life accordingly!

-The Lore Mechanic : after defeating a Boss he will drop you a Lore Scroll that you can read and is accurate to the Minecraft Lore ! Those are wrote by me so if you have some suggestions you can share them !


-The Post Ender Dragon "game" Mechanic : this mod now adds a complete walktrough after defeating the Ender Dragon also with a full Lore !

-The Hardmode: After defeating the Ender Dragon you'll enter the Hardmode that can be configured in files :p



![bosses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3144c6a53ff3c7b71473665bbe35ef28e16141b_0.webp)


🧠Bosses Order :



Armageddon Mod brings 6 new bosses for the vanilla basic adventure and also 5 other after defeating the Ender Dragon ! You'll have to face them in a correct order to progress through the game.


At first, craft the Iron Remote to beat the first one and after each Boss that you'll defeat. The ore that he will drop can be used to craft the next Summon Item for the next boss and so on ! 



<details>
<summary>Boss Order</summary>

Bosses order (spoiler alert !!):

-The Iron Colossus

-The Goblin Lord

-Arion, Tyrant of the Emerald Wrath

-Eldorath, the Ancient Builder

-The Elder Guardian (vanilla)

-The Elvenite Paladin

-The Wither (vanilla)

-Zoranth, the Forgotten One

-The Ender Dragon (vanilla)

-Vaedric, the Fallen Wanderer

-The Bringer of Doom

-The Calamities

-Zoranth, Newborn of the Zenith

-Nyxaris, the Veil of Oblivion

-...

</details>





Each fights are uniques and bosses all have their own "patterns" and attacks with custom animations !

The fights are compatible with Multiplayer aswell (up to ♾ players !) but you'll maybe encounter some bugs with the hitbox and accuracy.

At the end of a fight you also gain a Treasure Bag with a ton of loots inside, a Lore Scroll and finally a Relic to decorate your house !!

The Ender Dragon also drops he's Treasure Bag and he becomes a major boss with Armageddon. When he's defeated the Hardmode will start, ennemies will be much stronger and everything can be configured in the files.
New accesories can also drop from vanilla mobs and protect you from bad potion effects.



![others](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ce4f72a261d3b918d5c29f87e14c387ee2ba98d_0.webp)



Of course, that's not all Armageddon also adds several items, weapons, armor, blocks, potions, etc. to your journey that I'll let you discover in-game, as it would take too long to detail them all here! 

A complete lore that i've wroted myself can also be read with the Lore Scrolls ! ((read it plz))

Note : For the Accesories, you'll be able to fusion them with a Template that can be crafted.



![dev](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da742d612b7b5f43342fff7d6929b743bb617515_0.webp)


Here a list of common tags to prevent the uses of items/tools ! :

-forge:iron_tools (until The Iron Colossus is defeated)

-forge:iron_armor (")

-forge:iron_blocks (")

-forge:golden_tools (until The Goblin Lord is defeated)

-forge:golden_armor (")

-forge:gold_blocks (")

-forge:emerald_tools (until Arion is defeated)

-forge:emerald_armor (")

-forge:emerald_blocks (")


-forge:diamond_tools (until Eldorath is defeated)

-forge:diamond_armor (")

-forge:diamond_blocks (")

-forge:netherite_tools (until Zoranth is defeated)

-forge:netherite_armor (")

-forge:netherite_blocks (")

-forge:elvenite_tools (until The Elvenite Paladin is defeated)

-forge:elvenite_armor (")

-forge:elvenite_blocks (")

-forge:voiderite_tools (until Vaedric is defeated)

-forge:voiderite_armor (")

-forge:voiderite_blocks (")

-forge:bloody_tools (until the Calamities are defeated)

-forge:bloody_armor (")

-forge:bloody_blocks (")

-forge:helionite_tools (until Zoranth, Newborn of the Zenith is defeated)

-forge:helionite_armor (")

-forge:helionite_blocks (")

-forge:chaos_mobs (this mobs are dropping Chaos Spirit)
-forge:dread_mobs (this mobs are dropping Dread Spirit)
-forge:despair_mobs (this mobs are dropping Despair Spirit)


Armageddon (v1.0) now provide a config file with a ton of things to configure !


![thanks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6905fa8cd19f94436164d623497c3c3deba47f5_0.webp)


Thanks to Mcreator that allows me to do the Mod ! And also the Mcreator Creation Hub Discord Server !
Some texture are also part of Terraria and Calamity Mod
Some ideas also come from them ;))



Translations :

Russian :  by @undedinside on Discord !!





Feel free to use that mod in your Modpack, but don't redistribute it without my permission!

You cant reuse the 3d models, animations, texture of that mod, if you want to ask me on my discord server directly! 

THANKS YOUU
